headline: Elevance Health (ELV) Launches Health OS To Make Care More Connected
summary: Elevance Health (NYSE:ELV) has launched its Health OS platform, aimed at creating more connected and streamlined healthcare experiences. The company is rolling out new digital and personalized programs, including Proactive Member Engagement, Concierge Care, and Total Movement Care. The Health OS platform is designed to improve connectivity between providers, reduce administrative work, and speed up care decisions for members. headline: New Elevance Health Public Policy Institute Study Examines Payment Disputes for Planned Procedures Under the No Surprises Act
summary: INDIANAPOLIS, June 25, 2026--The No Surprises Act was created to protect patients from unexpected medical bills. While those patient protections are working, new research from the Elevance Health Public Policy Institute suggests that the law's payment dispute process is producing unexpected results for some planned medical procedures.

headline: Plus Therapeutics Secures National Coverage Agreement with Elevance Health for CNSide® Cerebrospinal Fluid Assay for Metastatic CNS Cancer
summary: HOUSTON, June 25, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- CNSide Diagnostics, LLC, a wholly-owned subsidiary of Plus Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: PSTV) (“Plus” or the “Company”), announced today that it has signed a national agreement with Elevance Health, Inc. (NYSE: ELV), effective May 1, 2026, covering approximately 45.4 million people throughout the United States, to provide the CNSide® Cerebrospinal Fluid (CSF) Tumor Cell Enumeration (TCE) assay.
